id.description: Stable lowercase identifier generated from company and robot.

company.description: Company, lab, or organization associated with the robot.

website.description: Official or best available product/company URL.

youtube.description: Relevant YouTube channel or demo URL.

b2b_client.description: Known customers or target customer signal from the working database.

stock.description: Ticker or public/private status field from the working database.

valuation.description: Valuation field preserved as text because values need source verification.

rounds.description: Funding rounds or total funding field preserved as text.

release.description: Release year or first public signal.

walk_kmh.description: Walking speed in km/h when known.

run_kmh.description: Running speed in km/h when known.

payload_kg.description: Payload or carrying capacity in kilograms when known.

software.description: Software stack, SDK, autonomy notes, or related software link.

clothed.description: Whether the robot is presented clothed or human-styled in the working database.
